title: China-to-UAE Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: 50 Hz 230/400 V Grid Re-Validation Against UAE Utility Settings
rows.target_requirement: DEWA eligibility and DRRG documentation require inverter evidence to align with the relevant connection category and DEWA compliance tests. Even where China test files show 50 Hz operation, UAE deployment should re-check voltage/frequency windows, trip thresholds, reconnection timing, power-quality limits, harmonic spectrum data, low-voltage or medium-voltage category, and local nameplate settings for 230/400 V distribution practice and the project utility's approved parameters.
target_standards: DEWA DRRG Standards - Version 3.0 - December 2023
DEWA PV inverter eligibility requirement for harmonic spectrum data
Project-specific utility connection approval and commissioning evidence
IEC 61000-2-2 and IEC/TR 61000-3-14 voltage-quality references listed by DEWA for LV-connected RRGPs
rows.china_equivalent: China baseline files often use GB/T 37408, GB/T 19964, NB/T 32004, and domestic utility profiles. They are not proof that UAE trip settings, reconnection timing, harmonic limits, or commissioning evidence are correct for DEWA or another emirate utility.
rows.gap: The technical gap is firmware profile control and evidence traceability. Exporters should lock the UAE grid profile, document country code or parameter settings, provide harmonic spectrum data for the exact model, and prepare commissioning checks that match the utility's accepted values.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for project commissioning where the utility requires approved settings and evidence; exact thresholds are project and utility specific
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T or NB/T baseline evidence is not sufficient without UAE utility profile validation

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Re-validate the UAE grid profile rather than shipping with China default settings. DEWA and project utility files should show the exact inverter model, firmware profile, harmonic data, and commissioning settings.

rows.requirement: DEWA DRRG Grid Connection, Anti-Islanding, and Utility-Interface Evidence
rows.target_requirement: DEWA Shams Dubai relies on DRRG standards, connection conditions, connection guidelines, inspection and testing requirements, and eligible equipment lists for distributed renewable resource generators. For PV inverters, DEWA minimum eligibility points to the DRRG Standards Version 3.0, December 2023, including inverter compliance tests for low-voltage and/or medium-voltage connected RRGPs. Anti-islanding and utility-interface evidence should be prepared in the DEWA DRRG context rather than treated as a generic China grid certificate.
target_standards: DEWA DRRG Standards - Version 3.0 - December 2023
DEWA DRRG Connection Conditions
DEWA DRRG Connection Guidelines - Version 2.1 - March 2024
DEWA DRRG Inspection and Testing Guidelines - Version 2.0 - April 2020
IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 as common anti-islanding and utility-interface evidence where requested by project or utility review
rows.china_equivalent: China grid evidence commonly references GB/T 19964, GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, utility test reports, and domestic anti-islanding settings. These can support a technical delta review but do not replace DEWA DRRG equipment enrollment, project connection conditions, inspection, or commissioning files.
rows.gap: The gap is project and utility acceptance: the inverter evidence must be aligned with the relevant DEWA appendix, low-voltage or medium-voltage connection category, protection settings, reconnection behavior, harmonic evidence, and commissioning sequence.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for DEWA-connected distributed renewable resource projects in Dubai where Shams Dubai / DRRG requirements apply; outside Dubai, the relevant emirate utility route must be confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-code evidence is not transferable as UAE utility approval

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat DEWA DRRG review as a separate utility gate. IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 and China GB/T grid files are useful only when mapped to the DEWA connection category and project file.

rows.requirement: MoIAT / ESMA ECAS and EQM Scope Screening for PV Inverters
rows.target_requirement: UAE conformity services include certificates for products subject to technical regulations, certificates for products not subject to technical regulations, attestation of GSO conformity certificates, national conformity marks, and product status services. For solar PV inverters, ECAS certification is mandatory under UAE Cabinet Decision No. 10 of 2020, the UAE Control System for Solar Products, administered by MoIAT. EQM, DEWA, or another emirate utility process may still apply separately depending on the model, mark route, customer requirement, project, or connection authority.
target_standards: MoIAT conformity certificate services for products subject to technical regulations
MoIAT conformity certificate services for products not subject to technical regulations
MoIAT national marks services and product status services
UAE Cabinet Decision No. 10 of 2020 - UAE Control System for Solar Products, administered by MoIAT
Attestation of GSO conformity certificates where applicable
rows.china_equivalent: China commonly has GB-standard and voluntary CQC/CGC evidence for PV inverters, but those files do not by themselves establish UAE ECAS scope, EQM mark eligibility, or DEWA equipment eligibility. A UAE product-status and utility-route check is still needed.
rows.gap: The market-access gap is ECAS file readiness and route selection. Exporters should prepare model family lists, nameplate ratings, HS code, intended emirate and use case, existing IEC/CB/GB reports, and local representative details for MoIAT/ESMA and utility review.

mandatory_status.en: ECAS certification is mandatory for solar PV inverters under UAE Cabinet Decision No. 10 of 2020, UAE Control System for Solar Products, administered by MoIAT. EQM and utility eligibility remain separate route-, mark-, customer-, project-, or connection-specific checks.
mandatory_status.zh: 根据由 MoIAT 管理的 2020 年阿联酋内阁决定第 10 号《阿联酋太阳能产品控制体系》，太阳能光伏逆变器必须取得 ECAS 认证。EQM 和电力公司设备资格仍属于单独的路径、标志、客户、项目或接入要求核查。
mandatory_status.zht: 根據由 MoIAT 管理的 2020 年阿聯酋內閣決定第 10 號《阿聯酋太陽能產品控制體系》，太陽能光伏逆變器必須取得 ECAS 認證。EQM 和電力公司設備資格仍屬於單獨的路徑、標誌、客戶、項目或接入要求核查。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat ECAS as mandatory for solar PV inverters under UAE Cabinet Decision No. 10 of 2020 and prepare the MoIAT conformity file accordingly. DEWA eligibility and project approval are separate from federal conformity services.

source.publisher: UAE Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT)

rows.requirement: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence for DEWA PV Inverter Eligibility
rows.target_requirement: DEWA states that PV inverter minimum eligibility depends on compliance to IEC 62109-1/2 or UL 1741, with mandatory compliance certificates issued by third-party ILAC-accredited laboratories according to ISO/IEC 17025. For Dubai Shams Dubai projects, this makes inverter safety type-test evidence a practical eligibility gate before the model can be added to the DEWA eligible equipment route.
target_standards: UL 1741 as an alternative listed by DEWA
ISO/IEC 17025 and ILAC-accredited laboratory certificate expectation
rows.china_equivalent: China GB-standard safety files and voluntary CQC/CGC reports may support engineering review, but DEWA's listed route requires the submitted compliance certificate to match the relevant DEWA eligibility criteria. A China-only report should be mapped to IEC 62109-1/-2 or supplemented with an accepted IEC/UL report.
china_standards: CQC or CGC voluntary PV inverter certification
rows.gap: The gap is not just the standard number. DEWA expects certificate evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory, model coverage consistent with the application, and clear linkage to the inverter family being enrolled.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for DEWA Shams Dubai equipment eligibility where the inverter is submitted for Dubai grid-connected PV use; federal ECAS/EQM mandatory status must be checked separately
mandatory_status.cn: China-only GB or voluntary reports are supporting evidence unless accepted by the UAE route or mapped to IEC/UL requirements

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] For Dubai projects, prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 or UL 1741 evidence from an ILAC-accredited lab before DEWA equipment enrollment. Treat this as separate from any federal UAE conformity certificate.

rows.requirement: UAE.S / GSO Standards Adoption and EMC Evidence
rows.target_requirement: MoIAT describes digital standards services that enable purchase of UAE and GSO standards, and GSO maintains a standards store with GSO IEC adoptions. DEWA's PV inverter minimum eligibility lists EMC-related requirements including IEC 61000-3-2 or IEC 61000-3-12 and one of the IEC 61000-6-x immunity/emission combinations depending on environment category. For UAE projects, exporters should confirm whether a UAE.S or GSO adoption, DEWA-specific certificate wording, or project contract controls the submitted EMC evidence.
target_standards: UAE and GSO standards services
GSO IEC standards adoption route
rows.china_equivalent: China EMC reports can be useful if they test equivalent IEC 61000 clauses and the model configuration is identical. They should still be checked against UAE.S/GSO adoption status, DEWA wording, laboratory accreditation, and the declared residential, commercial, light-industrial, or industrial environment.
china_standards: GB 4824 or GB/T 17799 series where applicable
rows.gap: The gap is evidence alignment: the EMC report must match the inverter model, firmware or hardware configuration, intended use environment, and UAE/DEWA wording. A report against a China-only GB test plan may need a clause-by-clause IEC/UAE.S/GSO mapping or re-test.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where DEWA equipment eligibility, a UAE technical regulation, GSO attestation route, or project contract requires the EMC evidence; otherwise supporting evidence for technical review
mandatory_status.cn: China EMC evidence may support but does not automatically satisfy UAE.S/GSO or DEWA wording

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Verify the current UAE.S/GSO adoption and DEWA certificate wording before relying on China EMC reports. EMC is often a documentation delta even when the underlying IEC tests are similar.

source.publisher: UAE Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT)
